summary: V2 redesign full E2E review. Backend: 21/21 pytest cases passed (topics with 'rant' slug, posts with sudo_name + 1000-char limit, link-based music with YouTube/Spotify auto-detection + invalid URL rejection, music spam 429 at 5/h, post spam 429 at 10/h, hug/fug toggle/switch with count updates, reports + 3-strike auto-hide, moderation safe/delete with X-Mod-Key='pluto-mod-2026'). Frontend: Landing hero (Pluto sphere, $PNF tagline, big gradient logo, 'Post it. Let it vanish.', dual CTAs), 4-item desktop nav (Home/Topics/Music/Info), 5-item mobile bottom nav, list-style trending rows (5 visible), trending music section, /topics with 'Rant' pill (no 'Tell Anything'), /info with all 4 cards + bottom CTA, CreatePostModal full UI (Drop a thought / 24h subtitle / 0/1000 counter / Sudo name / Tap to add an image / disclaimer / Post anonymously gradient submit), end-to-end post creation with sudo_name visible on /topics, UploadMusicModal full UI (auto YOUTUBE badge on link paste, lyrics toggle, sudo name, tags, submit disabled until valid link), upload + Play -> YouTube iframe embed working, Hug counter increments 0->1 correctly. Mobile bottom nav has all 5 testids visible.

minor.issue: CORS_ORIGINS and MOD_KEY appear concatenated on the same line (existing issue from iteration 1, not blocking — MOD_KEY default fallback covers it).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~395 lines (clean) — still monolithic but acceptable for MVP scale.
cleanup_expired_music() runs on every GET /music — would benefit from a Mongo TTL index on expires_at field for production scale.
Backend silently truncates over-length sudo_name/title/caption to slice limits ([:24], [:200], [:800]) instead of 422; OK product choice but document client-side.
Music link uniqueness/dedup not enforced — same YouTube URL can be uploaded multiple times by different devices (visible on /music page during testing).
oEmbed fetch happens client-side — title/artist may be empty if oEmbed CORS fails or rate-limits. Backend already handles empty title/artist gracefully.
Pydantic validation, async/await, _id stripping, env-var usage, HTTP status codes all correct.
No real bugs found — V2 redesign is fully wired and working.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_pluto_api.py (rewritten for V2 link-based music schema, sudo_name, rant topic, 1000-char limit)
test_credentials: Mod key: pluto-mod-2026 (X-Mod-Key header / /mod-station password). Anonymous device_id stored in localStorage 'pluto.device_id'.
seed_data_creation: Tests create disposable TEST_-prefixed posts and music tracks via API. They auto-expire in 24h. Currently visible on /music: ~10 cards including Rick Astley YouTube test track, TEST_spam* link tracks. One post 'TEST_UI_e2e thought from playwright' with sudo_name 'ui_ghost' visible under #rant on /topics.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_pluto_api.py (21 tests, all passing). Run: `cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) python -m pytest backend/tests/test_pluto_api.py -v`. Frontend Playwright validated all 4 nav items + bottom nav, modals, post creation flow with sudo_name persistence, music upload with YouTube provider auto-detect + iframe embed on Play, hug toggle increments correctly. Music card testids are play-{id}/hug-{id}/fug-{id} (NOT prefixed with 'music-'). Topics page route is /topics (also /feed alias). /info renders 4 cards. Legacy 'tell-anything' fully removed both backend and frontend.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All review-request features work end-to-end.
